rulings.Case Title: GREGORY MILBURN et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, October 30, 2009, line 2, DEFENDANT CAVCO INDUSTRIES, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. MOTION DENIED, FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF'S INTERROGATORY RESPONSES SPECIFICALLY DESCRIBE THE TYPE OF WORK HE PERFORMED, A DISCRETE TIME PERIOD, AND THE PRODUCTS HE WORKED WITH. PLAINTIFF TESTIFIED HE WORKED ON ORIGINAL ROOF COATING AND THAT DEFENDANT'S MOBILE HOMES WERE COMMON. (PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION PAGES 94-95 AND 113.) DEFENDANT DOES NOT PRESENT EVIDENCE THAT ITS ORIGINAL ROOF COATINGS DID NOT CONTAIN ASBESTOS. HOWEVER DEPOSITION CITES KOOL SEAL AND ELIXIR ROOF COATINGS AS CONTAINING ASBESTOS. OBJECTIONS TO BALL DECLARATION SUSTAINED FOR LACK OF PERSONAL KNOWLEDGE AND INSUFFICIENT FOUNDATION. SOPHISTICATED USER DEFENSE NOT APPLICABLE, NO EVIDENCE THAT PLAINTIFF WAS TRAINED OR "SOPHISTICATED." =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: JILL TOUPS VS. CHRISTOPHER RANSOM JR. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, October 30, 2009, line 8, DEFENDANT PETER SPATARO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. MOTION DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RAISED WHETHER DEFENDANT WAS A BONA-FIDE ENCUMBRANCES. E-MAILS INDICATE AMY GREEN, DEFENDANT'S ESCROW AGENT, KNEW ABOUT PLAINTIFF, PLAINTIFF'S POSSIBLE INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY, AND THE PRIOR LITIGATION BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND RANSOM. JUDGMENT ON SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT WEBSITE INDICATED RANSOM NO LONGER HAD AN INTEREST IN THE SUBJECT PROPERTY. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RAISED REGARDING DEFENDANT'S IMPUTED KNOWLEDGE FROM HIS ESCROW AGENT. (SEE TRIPLE A MANAGEMENT CO., INC. V. FRISONE (1999) 69 CAL.APP.4TH 520.) SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS ALLEGED DOMINION OVER HER EQUITY "DAMAGED IN AN AMOUNT EQUAL TO THE VALUE OF THE EQUITY APPROPRIATED," NOT TITLE, SO IT IS A CLAIM FOR PERSONAL PROPERTY. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED REGARDING INJUNCTION CAUSE OF ACTION WHERE FACTUAL ALLEGATIONS SUPPORT AN INJUNCTION. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED REGARDING PUNITIVE DAMAGES, A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT IS RAISED REGARDING DEFENDANT'S MALICE, FRAUD OR OPPRESSION IN VIEW OF IMPUTED KNOWLEDGE OF ESCROW AGENT. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Recall And Quash Execution And Vacate Levy
